question: Given a 2D integer array (matrix), write a program to calculate and print the sum of all its elements.
errors: The outer loop condition `i <= matrix.size()` allows the loop variable `i` to exceed the valid index range for the matrix. When `i` becomes `matrix.size()`, accessing `matrix[i]` results in an out-of-bounds access, leading to undefined behavior such as a crash, memory corruption, or an incorrect sum.
